title: Cycle-04 fix-check closure, documentation contract reconciliation, and stale-endpoint sweep
description: Completed cycle-04 fix-check reporting for the prior audit findings, reconciled stale API/documentation contract drift in acceptance and test-plan docs, and verified no stale endpoint patterns remain in docs for the audited legacy patterns.

errors.error: Acceptance checklist contained stale/incorrect endpoint and capability references for parking operations, job triggering, export format scope, and observability metric wording.
errors.cause: Checklist lines drifted after backend route and capability updates were completed in earlier sessions.
errors.fix: Updated parking endpoint evidence to dashboard/lots stats routes, replaced stale manual trigger route with existing `/api/jobs/:id/retry` semantics, updated export evidence to CSV/XLSX, and clarified runtime metrics to include p95 latency and error rate.

errors.error: API spec had stale field contracts for job records, anomaly assignment payload, and shipment creation payload.
errors.cause: Spec rows were partially outdated relative to current controllers/services after prior remediation work.
errors.fix: Aligned docs to implemented schema/handlers: updated job record fields/status set, corrected anomaly assign field to `assignedToId`, and corrected shipment create payload to `fulfillmentRequestId`, `carrierId`, `warehouseId`, `estimatedDeliveryAt?`.

errors.error: Test-plan API inventory lagged behind current test coverage for idempotency expansion, shipment-sync monitor visibility, parking detector automation, observability metric semantics, and XLSX export behavior.
errors.cause: Coverage summary text was not refreshed after tests were expanded in earlier fixes.
errors.fix: Refreshed API test inventory descriptions to reflect current route-level and behavior-level assertions now present in idempotency/jobs/parking/observability/master-data test suites.

errors.error: Cycle-04 round-1 fix-check artifact did not exist.
errors.cause: Findings were remediated previously, but the dedicated cycle-04 closure artifact had not been written.
errors.fix: Created cycle-04 fix-check report with finding-by-finding status, line-linked evidence, documentation reconciliation notes, stale-endpoint scan result, and runtime verification summary.

rootCause: Post-remediation documentation and closure-artifact lag: implementation-level fixes existed, but acceptance/spec/test-plan narratives required final synchronization and a formal cycle-04 closure record.
impact: Without this session's updates, acceptance evidence would remain harder to audit due to stale contract references and a missing cycle-04 closure artifact, despite underlying implementation fixes being present.

validation.method: Static documentation/endpoint pattern scans plus targeted Dockerized runtime verification executed in this session.
